charter.mission: Review whether the new 10-row bounded training-facing layer can replace the original 7-row baseline as the default layer for the next bounded pilot.
in_scope: compare the 7-row baseline and the 10-row bounded extension
preserve guarded posture on the three added branch rows
decide default-layer replacement only within the bounded pilot scope
success_criteria: a default next-pilot layer can be named explicitly
the replacement decision preserves guarded branch boundaries
the next lawful move becomes an actual pilot on the chosen layer

interpretation: V1.12BA is a replacement review, not a new training promotion pass.
This remains bounded, report-only, and non-deployable.
